category_sources: source_facts.description says "CLI tool for rustypaste"; official repository README describes it as a CLI tool for rustypaste.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is rustypaste-cli; official GitHub repository title and README use rustypaste-cli.
docs_sources: Official GitHub repository README contains installation, build-from-source, and usage documentation for rpaste.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already populated with https://github.com/orhun/rustypaste-cli, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies a CLI for rustypaste; official README documents rpaste usage for uploading files to a rustypaste server.
